title: 100 PCS Cosmetic Spatula for Makeup Face Mask Plastic Spoon Disposable Makeup Tools for Mixing and Sampling 4.88'' x 1.06" Random Color
description:
About this item
Great for DIY cosmetic products, appling makeup or skin care products, useful to sampling beauty products and more.
The cosmetic spatula can take cosmetic out from your jars for less mess and keeping it clean from bacteria, more hygienic and safe.
These plastic spoon is comfortable to hold and very lightweight, convenient and easy to carry in your makeup bag or when you are on a trip.
Material: Environmental friendly PP plastic; Perfect size: approx 4.88'' x 1.06" ; Quantity: 100pcs, 7 colors random assigned.
Package Include: 100pcs makeup spatulas
reviews_5s:
I bought these to mix essential oils with my massage cream in smaller containers. They work great.Bought this too easily scoop up any hand scrubs, as well as easy to apply the hand scrub for those who don’t want to use their handsThese are handy for cosmetics and help keep the products more sanitary. A good length.Lately, I've been obsessed with ordering TikTok shop body glazes. The QsQueen Cosmetic spatulas work perfectly for mixing different body glaze scents and application to the body. I plan to purchase more cosmetic spatulas as I love the quality, durability, and colors. I highly recommend the price for 100 disposable spatulas, which come in a convenient, sturdy box for storage.Just what I was looking forThere are tons of uses for these little spoons!Met my expeectations.These come in really cute colors and they are the perfect size to reach the bottom of all of your cosmetic jars and tubs to retrieve the very last bit of your product. And you can use both ends of the spatulas, depending on the size of your cosmetic containers.It seems that every beauty cream comes with an itsy-bitsy CLEAR version of these. Put those little suckers down on my granite vanity and they seem to disappear. These are a great size to handle and are colored. Now I can find them after using.After seeing some of the reviews that there weren't 100 in the pack, the first thing I did was count them upon arrival. I had 114.

These are perfect for skin care. I use them for creams, whipped soap, body scrub....just about everything. They hold up to scooping these products. Great value for the price.

I wash my spatulas with soap and water and they get a Barbicide treatment weekly.
reviews_1s:
...small. They are useless for mixing 2 part Epoxy unless you're only mixing about 1 oz in the smallest mixing container you can find.
I threw mine out, they don't work for my needs.There are only 88 pieces not the advertised 100. I counted 3 times to be certain. Product quality seems good for my needs, i just hate there weren’t the advertised 100.The product was broken when I opened the packaging from where it was shippedThey were way too big for lip balms. I did not like the item. Bigger than it looked on the picturegoodThese are way to big for makeup applications. There like a teaspoon. Bad buy!
